title: [Ecentrix] Progressive Furnaces
description: Introduces progressive furnace tiers that improve smelting speed while staying true to vanilla gameplay.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31b96b0e93a7da4bcb69c4faee59c88710c1dcfe.png)
[![CurseForge](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Favailable%2Fcurseforge_vector.svg\&n=-1)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ecentrix-progressive-furnaces) [![Modrinth](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Favailable%2Fmodrinth_vector.svg\&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecentrix-progressive-furnaces) [![Fabric API](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Frequires%2Ffabric-api_vector.svg\&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
### 📖 About **Progressive Furnaces** introduces clear, vanilla-friendly progression to Minecraft’s furnace system. Instead of relying on a single furnace that never evolves, this mod adds multiple furnace tiers that gradually improve smelting speed. Each upgrade feels like a natural step forward while fully preserving the familiar vanilla gameplay loop. Designed for survival worlds and modpacks alike, Progressive Furnaces integrates seamlessly without replacing or overcomplicating existing mechanics. ### ⚙️ Features * Multiple furnace tiers with increasing smelting speed * Clear and intuitive upgrade-based progression * Vanilla-style recipes and visuals * Balanced for survival gameplay and modpack environments * Powered by **Progressive Core** for shared systems and long-term compatibility ### 🛠️ Installation ✅ **Required on both client and server** * Requires **Fabric API** * Requires **Progressive Core** ## ⭐ Related Mods [![Progressive Core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e6fe6000fc73c1b9ccb765f66f1e7411011b767.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecentrix-progressive-core) [![Progressive Storage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a52ad3399b3dbb88e88b469fe0ae6ef315414b1.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecentrix-progressive-storage) [![Progressive Backpacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77d1642a6a2fb84121a061b12cf729e0ca5c72ee.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecentrix-progressive-backpacks)
